overall.description: First-person exploration through a tropical Caribbean-style town in a video game, beginning at a central colonial church plaza, continuing through colorful streets, and transitioning to a dirt path behind buildings. The scene features warm late-afternoon lighting, palm trees, and mountainous backdrops typical of Far Cry 6's Yara setting.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward the church through the open town square

tall palm tree with green fronds

rocky mountain peaks visible behind the town
blue and orange colonial-style building with balconies

segments.scene_description: The camera walks forward through a sunlit town square toward a prominent colonial church with a bell tower. Palm trees frame the scene on both sides while colorful buildings and distant mountains complete the tropical setting.

segments.scene_description: Moving past the church, the camera traverses a plaza featuring stone planters and wooden benches. Two villagers converse near the seating area while colonial buildings and palm trees line the path toward the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: colonial street with sidewalk and power lines

sun glare becomes prominent as camera turns toward the setting sun

segments.scene_description: The camera moves from the plaza onto a paved street lined with colorful colonial buildings. A villager walks toward the camera on the sidewalk as the sun begins to create lens flare, illuminating the pink and green buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path behind buildings with rocky cliff backdrop

events.description: turning off the paved street onto a dirt path behind the pink building

agents.ego_description: turning right onto a dirt path and walking along the back of the pink building toward the rocky cliffs

segments.scene_description: Turning off the street, the camera follows a dirt path behind the pink building, leaving the paved road behind. The path leads toward a rocky cliff face with the setting sun creating bright glare, while the building now appears on the left side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a vibrant colonial town square that gradually transitions into a rugged dirt path leading toward a rocky cliff. It begins by walking through a sunlit plaza toward a prominent colonial church and bell tower, framed by tropical palm trees and distant mountains. As the camera moves past the church, the scene shifts through a pedestrian area with stone planters and wooden benches where villagers converse, before flowing onto a paved street lined with colorful pink and green buildings. The lighting intensifies with a bright lens flare as the camera passes a pedestrian on the sidewalk, eventually turning away from the paved road to follow a dirt path behind the buildings. The journey concludes as the camera heads toward a rocky cliff face, with the setting sun creating a brilliant glare across the landscape.
